created_from: 2026软科中国合作办学大学排名派生表
2026软科中国大学专业排名本地索引
metadata.policy: Local ranking DB is for semantic retrieval and safe alias matching. Reports may use ranking values only when name mapping is safe; otherwise mark unresolved and do not guess.
metadata.display_policy: QS/软科排名可展示名次和年份；软科分值默认不展示。软科专业排名必须说明映射状态，建议匹配不得当作精确事实。

qs_world_university_rankings.dataset: QS World University Rankings - latest three editions
notes: Downloaded from official QS/TopUniversities pages or official QS/TopUniversities Excel export URLs.
Rank fields are kept as strings to preserve bands and tied ranks such as '701+' or '43='.
Score fields are numeric where the official sheet provides a numeric value; '-' is stored as null.
Fields are normalized to snake_case; per-edition column maps preserve the original Excel headers.

alias_map.notes: 中文外方名需映射到QS英文官方名。
如用户输入深圳大学，映射到QS英文名。
当前本地QS三年榜未命中时返回未上榜/未入库，不能误映射为深圳大学或香港理工大学。
